title: Verify email link expires after 24 hours
preconditions: User has successfully registered with a valid email and password
A verification link was generated and sent to the user's email
The current time is exactly 24 hours after the link was generated
test_steps: Open the verification link from the email
expected_results: The system displays an error message indicating the link has expired
The account remains unverified

title: Verify unique verification link per registration
preconditions: Two separate user accounts have been registered with different email addresses
Both accounts have received verification links
test_steps: Capture the verification link from the first account's email
Capture the verification link from the second account's email
expected_results: The two verification links are different and unique to each account

title: Verify verification link tampering is rejected
preconditions: User has successfully registered with a valid email and password
A verification link was generated and sent to the user's email
test_steps: Modify the token portion of the verification link (e.g., change a character or append extra data)
Open the modified link in a browser
expected_results: The system displays an error message indicating the link is invalid or tampered
The account remains unverified

title: Resend verification email after 60 seconds cooldown
preconditions: User has successfully registered with a valid email and password
The initial verification email was sent
The user waits exactly 60 seconds after the initial request
expected_results: The system sends a new verification email to the user's email address
The user receives the email within a reasonable time

title: Resend verification email within 60 seconds cooldown
preconditions: User has successfully registered with a valid email and password
The initial verification email was sent
The user attempts to resend within 60 seconds of the initial request
test_steps: Click the 'Resend verification email' button immediately after the first request
expected_results: The system blocks the resend request
The system displays an error message indicating the cooldown period has not elapsed

title: Resend rate limit exceeded for account
preconditions: User has successfully registered with a valid email and password
The user has already made 3 resend requests within the last 1 hour for the same account
test_steps: Attempt to make a 4th resend request for the same account within the same 1-hour window
expected_results: The system blocks the resend request
The system displays an error message indicating the rate limit has been exceeded and the feature is locked for 30 minutes

title: Resend rate limit exceeded for IP
preconditions: Multiple accounts have been registered from the same IP address
The IP address has already made 3 resend requests within the last 1 hour (across any accounts)
test_steps: Attempt to make a 4th resend request from the same IP address within the same 1-hour window
expected_results: The system blocks the resend request
The system displays an error message indicating the rate limit has been exceeded and the feature is locked for 30 minutes for this IP

title: Resend during 30-minute lockout period
preconditions: The account or IP has exceeded the resend rate limit (3 attempts within 1 hour)
The 30-minute lockout period is still active (less than 30 minutes have passed since the last attempt)
test_steps: Attempt to make a resend request during the lockout period
expected_results: The system blocks the resend request
The system displays an error message indicating the feature is temporarily disabled due to rate limiting

title: Login blocked for unverified account
preconditions: User has successfully registered with a valid email and password
The user has not yet verified their email address
test_steps: Enter the registered email and password
expected_results: The system blocks the login attempt
The system displays an error message indicating the email address has not been verified

title: Login allowed after email verification
preconditions: User has successfully registered with a valid email and password
User has clicked the verification link and the account is now verified
test_steps: Enter the registered email and password
expected_results: The system allows the login
The user is redirected to the dashboard or home page

title: Expired verification link rejection
preconditions: User has successfully registered with a valid email and password
A verification link was generated and sent to the user's email
More than 24 hours have passed since the link was generated
test_steps: Open the expired verification link from the email
expected_results: The system displays an error message indicating the link has expired
The account remains unverified

title: Request new verification link after expiry
preconditions: User has successfully registered with a valid email and password
The original verification link has expired (more than 24 hours old)
The user has not exceeded the resend rate limit
test_steps: Open the new verification link from the email
expected_results: The system sends a new verification email to the user's email address
The new verification link is valid and can be used to verify the account
After clicking the new link, the account becomes verified
